    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractTokenProvider
    Abstract base class for token-based IIssueProvider implementations.
    DeviceUtils
    Utility class for retrieving device and environment information.
    GenericLabelParser
    Default implementation of ILabelParser used by GenericProvider.
    GenericPayloadBuilder
    Default implementation of IPayloadBuilder used by GenericProvider.
    GenericProvider
    A configurable IIssueProvider implementation for interacting with arbitrary issue tracking APIs.
    GenericProvider.Builder
    Builder used to construct GenericProvider instances.
    GitHubLabelParser
    Utility class for parsing GitHub label JSON responses.
    GitHubPayloadBuilder
    Builds JSON payloads for creating GitHub issues via the repository_dispatch event.
    GitHubProvider
    GitHub issue provider implementation for the IIssueProvider interface.
    IIssueProvider
    Interface representing a provider for issue tracking systems.
    ILabelParser
    Functional interface for parsing labels from a raw string input.
    IPayloadBuilder
    Functional interface for building a provider-specific payload to report an Issue.
    Issue
    Represents an issue to report to a tracking system.
    Issue.Builder
    Builder for creating Issue objects.
    IssueProviderFactory
    Factory for creating IIssueProvider instances.
    IssueProviderType
    Enumerates the supported issue provider types.
    IssueProviderType.ProviderCreator
    Functional interface used to construct IIssueProvider instances.
    IssueReporter
    High-level utility for reporting issues to a repository via an IIssueProvider.
    IssueReporter.Builder
    Builder class for IssueReporter with fluent API.
    JIssueSystem
    Deprecated.
    Label
    Represents a label associated with an Issue.
    LabelContract
    Represents a contract of required labels for a repository.
    NetUtils
    Utility class for network-related string operations.
